arts.ttl: Preview: Sporting Lisbon vs. Benfica - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Taca da Liga clash between Sporting Lisbon and Benfica, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Juventus Step Up Pursuit of Antonio Silva with Jorge Mendes’ Intervention
arts.sum: Juventus' sporting director Cristiano Giuntoli is working on multiple fronts to secure the much-needed defensive reinforcements for Thiago Motta's squad. With Feyenoord's firm rejection of any mid-season transfer for David Hancko, Giuntoli has intensified efforts to acquire Ronald Araujo from Barcelona, collaborating closely with the player's agent to negotiate a loan deal with an option to buy. The post Juventus Step Up Pursuit of Antonio Silva with Jorge Mendes’ Intervention appeared first on FootItalia.com.
